name: tail
description: Output the last part of files

name: -n
--lines
options.description: Output the last N lines instead of the last 10

name: -f
--follow
options.description: Output appended data as the file grows

name: -q
--quiet
--silent
options.description: Never output headers giving file names

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Always output headers giving file names

options.name: --pid
options.description: With -f, terminate after process ID dies

name: -s
--sleep-interval
options.description: With -f, sleep for approximately N seconds between iterations

options.name: --retry
options.description: Keep trying to open a file if it is inaccessible
